case_title: VILLASENOR, ANTHONY VS RODRIGUEZ, TERESA et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILLASENOR, ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, TERESA PALACIOS, CRYSTAL $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $192.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,692.00, THE COURT ATTRIBUTES 85% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO DEFT PALACIOS AND 15% COMPARATIVE FAULT TO DEFT RODRIGUEZ AND THEIR LAIBILITY FOR THE JUDGEMENT SHALL BE APPORTIONED ACCORDINGLY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY VILLASENOR, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, TERESA PALACIOS, CRYSTAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-27-2006 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, TERESA
PROOF OF SERVICE ON RODRIGUEZ, TERESA FILED. COMPUTER WON'T ACCEPT FILING. ONE IS ALREADY ON FILE.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, TERESA PALACIOS, CRYSTAL
